title: The Vanilla Expansion
description: A simple mod that expands Vanilla Minecraft through adding blocks and items.
body:
# Vanilla Expansion #

**Vanilla Expansion** is a mod that adds a lot of items and blocks to expand just a tiny bit the Vanilla experience. Please use JEI/REI for all the recipes for this mod.

Here are the features you'll find in this expansion
### Coal and Charcoal Chunk
These chunks can be used to cook 1 item at a time for Furnaces, Blast Furnaces, and Smokers

### Charcoal Block
Enough said. Coal Block but made out of Charcoal

### Bundle of Sticks and Block of Bundled Sticks
An item for compacting a lot of sticks

### Pile of Paper
Just for compacting paper

### Barrel of Food Items
Available for compacting Apples, Potatoes, Carrots, Sweet Berries, and Chorus Fruits

### Material Shards
Shards are basically equivalent to nuggets for ingots. It's available for Diamond, Emerald, and Nether Quartz Variants.

### Tool and Weapon Heads
These tool heads and sword blades can be used to upgrade your existing tools through the Smithing Table. Enchants will not be retained however and downgrading is not possible. Heads are available for every tool set is available in Vanilla and the Expansion.

### Smoked and Burnt Nether Quartz
These Nether Quartz variants are craftable by Smoking (Smoked) and Blasting (Burnt) Nether Quartz. It also comes with Smoked and Burnt Nether Quartz blocks.

### Fired Brick
By cooking a brick again, you get a fired brick. This can be used to make the same blocks as the normal brick does.

### Emerald Tools and Armor
Emeralds are not just for trading, it can also be used for tools and armor! The tools mine and the sword damage close to Diamond tools but a bit brittle. The armor has the same armor value as Diamond, but half the toughness of Netherite and a bit lower the durability or Diamond.

### Redstone Tools
Redstone tools mine significantly faster, twice the speed compared to Netherite tools (statistically)

### Quartz Variants Tools
Quartz Tools has almost the same durability as Stone, a bit faster mining speed as Iron, but more damaging compared to Netherite. These are available in Normal, Smoked, and Burnt Nether Quartz.

### Lapis Lazuli Armor
Lapis Lazuli armor has higher total armor compared to Chainmail, and the same durability as Iron.

### Reinforced Leather
By first crafting Raw Reinforced Leather and cooking it, you can get Reinforced Leather. 
<details>
<summary> Planned for future </summary>

The armor has the same armor value as normal Leather, the same toughness as Netherite, and has the same durability as Gold.

</details>

### Empowered Netherite
Crafting Empowered Netherite starts by empowering Netherite Scrap with a lot of Redstone. The armor has the same armor and thoughness as normal netherite and it provides a speed boost. The tools has the same durability of normal Netherite with a faster mining speed!


**THIS MOD IS CURRENTLY UNDER HEAVY DEVELOPMENT, PLEASE KNOW I AM A NEW SOLO DEVELOPER WORKING ON THIS MOD. EVERYTHING IS SUBJECT TO CHANGE.**

_NOTE: This mod is not an update or fork of any similarly named mods. If there's a problem about this, please contact me. Thank you!_

_**This is my first mod so please bear with me.**_

_Development is currently on a halt due to my college studies, will be back soon with maybe a Fabric port_
